# ADR-[NNN]: [Title]

**Date:** YYYY-MM-DD
**Status:** Proposed | Accepted | Deprecated | Superseded by ADR-[NNN]
**Author:** [Name or Agent ID]
**Deciders:** [List of people or agents involved in the decision]
**Consulted:** [List of people whose opinions were sought]
**Informed:** [List of people who are kept up-to-date]

Based on MADR 4.0.0 (https://adr.github.io/madr/)

## Context and Problem Statement

What is the issue or situation that motivates this decision?
Describe the context and problem statement in free form or as a question.

## Decision Drivers

- [Driver 1: e.g., performance requirement, team expertise, cost constraint]
- [Driver 2: e.g., security requirement, time-to-market pressure]
- [Driver 3: e.g., consistency with existing architecture]

## Considered Options

1. [Option 1]
2. [Option 2]
3. [Option 3]

## Decision Outcome

Chosen option: "[Option N]", because [justification. e.g., it best meets decision driver 1 and 2, even though it has trade-off X].

### Consequences

**Positive:**
- [e.g., Improvement in quality attribute, follows existing pattern]

**Negative:**
- [e.g., Introduces complexity, requires migration, trade-off with other quality]

**Neutral:**
- [e.g., Requires learning, changes team workflow]

### Confirmation

How will we verify this decision was implemented correctly?
- [e.g., Architecture test that validates the constraint]
- [e.g., CI check that enforces the pattern]
- [e.g., Review checklist item for PRs touching this area]

## Pros and Cons of the Options

### [Option 1]

- Good, because [argument]
- Good, because [argument]
- Bad, because [argument]
- Bad, because [argument]

### [Option 2]

- Good, because [argument]
- Good, because [argument]
- Bad, because [argument]

### [Option 3]

- Good, because [argument]
- Bad, because [argument]
- Bad, because [argument]

## More Information

- Related ADRs: [ADR-NNN, ADR-NNN]
- Related tickets: [TICKET-ID]
- Discussion: [link to PR or discussion thread if applicable]
